name: Yogurt Garlic-Mint Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 Degrees F.
2. Pour yogurt into a wide shallow bowl and set it on your work surface.
3. Season the bread crumbs with salt and freshly ground pepper.
4. Spread crumbs out on a platter and place next to the yogurt.
5. Place a wire rack over a baking sheet and set it aside.
6. Dry chicken, ensuring each piece is evenly coated.
7. Place chicken on the wire rack.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes.
9. To serve, place a piece of chicken on each of 4 small plates.
10. Pour some sauce in a crescent on the bottom edge of each plate around the chicken but not on it.
11. Place the remaining chicken on a platter and pass the remaining sauce in a clear pitcher.
12. Dipping Sauce: Place all the remaining ingredients in a blender or food processor. Turn off the motor, then flick it back on until a thin, flecked green sauce is achieved. Serve immediately.
